scope: Revenue Phase 1.5A governance enforcement and certification closure

branchProtection.bypassPolicy: No routine administrative or repository-role bypass is permitted. Administrators remain subject to the same pull-request review and required-check rules.

workflowIntegrity.skipBehavior: The generic suite may skip this integration file when REVENUE_TEST_POSTGRES is absent; the required workflow explicitly sets REVENUE_TEST_POSTGRES=true, and its only lifecycle test passed with zero skips.

failingObservation.cause: Disposable PostgreSQL attempted to create its Unix socket lock under /var/run/postgresql, which is not writable by the GitHub Actions runner. The harness was corrected to use its own temporary socket directory.

directPushAttempt.observedMessage: GH006: Protected branch update failed; at least 1 approving review is required by reviewers with write access.
directPushAttempt.proves: An administrator could not directly update main; no administrative bypass was available.

fullRepositorySuite.note: The four skips are outside the required disposable PostgreSQL workflow; that workflow ran its revenue test with zero skips.

remainingBlocker: Revenue Phase 1.5 production closure remains blocked because the separately authorized production backup/restore rehearsal and one controlled Anchor canary with exact reconciliation have not occurred. Phase 1.6 remains a separate approval and is not authorized by this artifact.
